signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.41 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; BoJ meeting on 28 Apr. JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry). Intervention risk on a break above 160.00; 160.00 is the key threshold that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7145 — HV30 at 8.2%, ATM IV at 9.4%. CFTC LF net long +41,675, WoW delta −1,101. Positioning stalling, options pricing a 1.2 vol-pt premium over realized; late-trend caution signal.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR leads G8 ( −0.486% avg, 7 pairs) while CAD leads at +0.382%, spread 0.869%. EUR underperformance vs peers; BoE 2.50% vs ECB 2% — 50bp carry disadvantage.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.3499 — BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral. GBP LF net long +28,426; positioning aligned with carry. ATM IV 9.5% near HV; 25d RR flat — options neutral.

signals.title: NZD/USD — RBNZ COT vs OIS Divergence
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −17,090 vs RBNZ hike 100% priced for 27 May. Short-squeeze risk elevated if RBNZ delivers hike; positioning stalling at 0.5874. Watch 27 May RBNZ meeting for catalyst.
